latestValidationChecks.criterion: 복수 클라이언트 WebSocket 연결 + 룸 입장/퇴장 처리
latestValidationChecks.evidence: room-manager.js implements joinRoom/leaveRoom/leaveAllRooms with per-match connection maps; ws/server.js handles join_match and leave_match messages and broadcasts joined_match/left_match to room members

latestValidationChecks.criterion: 60초 주기로 모든 캐릭터 행동 순차 처리 후 상태 브로드캐스트
latestValidationChecks.evidence: turn-scheduler.js uses setInterval(60000) per match; processTurn() iterates all living characters sequentially through AI engine → combat resolution → state update, then calls broadcastToRoom() with turn_result payload

latestValidationChecks.criterion: 전투 판정: 근접(80px) / 원거리(300px) 사거리 기반 데미지 계산 + HP 0 → 사망 처리
latestValidationChecks.evidence: combat.js defines GAME_CONSTANTS (MELEE_RANGE=80, MELEE_DAMAGE=15, RANGED_RANGE=300, RANGED_DAMAGE=10, HP=100); resolveAction() checks Euclidean distance before applying damage; HP≤0 sets alive=false

latestValidationChecks.criterion: 마지막 생존자 발생 시 게임 종료 이벤트 전송
latestValidationChecks.evidence: turn-scheduler.js calls getWinner() after each turn; winner found → broadcastToRoom() sends game_over frame with winner/placements, then finaliseMatch() writes result to PostgreSQL

latestValidationChecks.criterion: 서버 재시작 후 Redis에서 게임 상태 복원 가능
latestValidationChecks.evidence: redis-state.js saveMatchState/loadMatchState with 24h TTL; restoreActiveMatches() scans Redis for in_progress matches on startup and restarts timers; app.js calls this after Redis reconnect

validationChecks.criterion: 복수 클라이언트 WebSocket 연결 + 룸 입장/퇴장 처리
validationChecks.evidence: room-manager.js implements joinRoom/leaveRoom/leaveAllRooms with per-match connection maps; ws/server.js handles join_match, leave_match message types and broadcasts joined_match/left_match events to all room members

validationChecks.criterion: 60초 주기로 모든 캐릭터 행동 순차 처리 후 상태 브로드캐스트
validationChecks.evidence: turn-scheduler.js uses setInterval(60000) per match; processTurn() iterates all living characters sequentially via AI engine → combat resolution → state update, then calls broadcastToRoom() with turn_result payload

validationChecks.criterion: 전투 판정: 근접(80px) / 원거리(300px) 사거리 기반 데미지 계산 + HP 0 → 사망 처리
validationChecks.evidence: combat.js defines GAME_CONSTANTS (MELEE_RANGE=80, MELEE_DAMAGE=15, RANGED_RANGE=300, RANGED_DAMAGE=10, HP=100); resolveAction() checks Euclidean distance before applying damage; HP≤0 sets alive=false in processTurn()

validationChecks.criterion: 마지막 생존자 발생 시 게임 종료 이벤트 전송
validationChecks.evidence: turn-scheduler.js calls getWinner() after each turn; when a winner is found, broadcastToRoom() sends game_over frame with winner/placements, then finaliseMatch() writes result to PostgreSQL

validationChecks.criterion: 서버 재시작 후 Redis에서 게임 상태 복원 가능
validationChecks.evidence: redis-state.js saveMatchState/loadMatchState with 24h TTL; restoreActiveMatches() in turn-scheduler.js scans Redis for in_progress matches on startup and restarts their timers; app.js calls this after Redis reconnect
